pi_items.source: Task description and export_result.sh explicitly specify 'Creative Writing Midterm' as the configuration name to be created and queried.
Task description explicitly instructs to disable 'Allow spell checking', which corresponds to false.
Task description explicitly instructs to enable 'Use single app mode', which corresponds to true.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an exam configuration synthetically named 'Creative Writing Midterm'. The configuration explicitly requires disabling spell checking (false) and enabling single app mode (true) via the web interface.
